note: Three web-only merges. ZERO consensus / scripts / src changes. (1) Public Protocol Registry page for capsule-based timestamp / provenance records: NEW website/protocol-registry.html with magenta accent. Sections: hero, definitional line, what-it-proves vs what-it-does-not-prove, how a registry capsule works (6 steps), example PoPC record (JSON schema), verification steps, proposed PROTOCOL_CLAIM_V1 template id (future, NOT activated), future anti-spam model (not active), legal-safe footer. Uses existing CapsuleType::TEMPLATE_FIELDS_OPEN (0x05); no new capsule type at consensus. Nav magenta 'Protocol Registry' link added across main website pages. Forbidden-language audit: every patent / trademark / legal-ownership mention appears ONLY inside denial wording. (2) Harden SOST DEX non-custodial legal framing and client-side anti-scam education. Web / client-side only. No server-side moderation, no reading of encrypted messages, no logging of private content. Meta / hero rewritten to non-custodial bilateral signed-offer framing. New amber non-custodial safety banner (three NOTs), 'Why SOST DEX does not intervene' section, 'What SOST DEX can and cannot verify' two-column section, 'Honest counterparty vs scammer' table, 'Realistic DEX scam examples' (5 attack patterns), 'If you have been scammed' 8-step recovery guide, legal-safe DEX footer. NEW website/js/dex-anti-scam-warning.js (local-only, no network, no logging): hooks SOSTDEX.processAIInput() to scan typed AI-input text for 10 scam patterns; local modal warns with Cancel / proceed-anyway. Fails open on any error. (3) Explorer price-cards: add XAUT/BTC and PAXG/BTC charts below the existing USD price charts. Same card format, colors (gold XAUT, green PAXG), canvas size, 1H..5Y timeframe buttons, default 24H. Same CoinGecko market_chart endpoint with vs_currency=btc. Separate cache namespace via :btc suffix; USD-side logic untouched. BTC values formatted with 6-8 decimals. New cards in a second 3-column grid row under the USD row, third slot empty to preserve card width.
